title: In Qatar, Trapped Between the U.S. and Iran, War Forced a Reckoning
summary_full: The gas-rich Gulf nation is in a state of “strategic shock” after the war dealt a serious blow to its economy, sending ripples around the world.
summary_public: The gas-rich Gulf nation is in a state of “strategic shock” after the war dealt a serious blow to its economy, sending ripples around the world.
